raw_consumer_statement:
Last year XXXX or XXXX charges were made for fuel purchases in XXXX, FL using numbers from my XXXX XXXX XXXX 
I called the customer service number and explained that I had not been in XXXX in more than 50 years ago. 
They investigated and dropped all the charges except one charge for {$84.00}.

I have been complaining since then about this charge which was made in XXXX with the others that were dropped. 
They keep telling me they will investigate but I never hear from them until I get the monthly bill with the charge still there and late fees added. 
I have made several phone calls and all I hear is promises to help but no action. 
I NEED HELP GETTING THIS RESOLVED!
